ground_truth.title: Online Weight Management Program | Teladoc Health
ground_truth.main_content: Start your wellness journey today with Teladoc Health's online weight management program. Get a smart scale, a personalized action plan and ongoing expert coaching and support—all paid for by your employer or health plan. The program includes personalized content to manage food, activity and weigh-ins, plus dedicated expert coaching to get advice on nutrition, meal planning and more. Your health goals and challenges are unique, and you'll get personalized tools and support from expert coaches to help you take care of your health. The Teladoc Health app allows you to view weight trends, message a coach for advice, share reports with your doctor, snap a photo to log your food, set goals and track progress, and get personalized eating tips. Testimonials from program members highlight significant results: one member lost 20-25 pounds, another reports newfound confidence and life improvement, and others praise the program for helping them regain control of their lives. The program is completely at no cost to you—your employer, health plan or healthcare provider pays for the program on your behalf. After enrollment, you will receive a Teladoc Health Welcome Kit including the smart scale, and can download the mobile app to personalize your program and track progress. Teladoc Health takes privacy seriously, with health information protected by federal and state laws including HIPAA. Eligibility requires enrollment through your employer, health plan or health provider. The program may also offer GLP-1 medication support for eligible members when clinically appropriate, though certain criteria must be met and costs may vary depending on insurance coverage.

This program helped me when I thought that nothing could help me. I've learned small tweaks that have really helped me drastically. I'm down 20-25 pounds since starting Livongo.
Yes! It is completely at no cost to you. Your employer, health plan or health provider pays for the program on your behalf.
Teladoc Health care providers can prescribe GLP-1s for weight loss for eligible members enrolled in Weight Management when clinically appropriate.
